problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
hypothesis: The key to Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? is Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation — specifically Mitochondrial membrane potential — which would help 2,100,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
